## James Drayton

"Don't walk in front of me, I may not follow ~ don't walk behind me, I may not lead ~ Just walk beside me and be my friend."

James Drayton, 65 formerly of Harrisburg passed peacefully Wednesday January 26, 2011. James loved reading and was a legal advocate as well as a gifted conversationalist. He leaves to mourn his beloved mother Frances Spears Drayton, two children Tiffany Gutherie and Kimberly Price, four siblings Henry Drayton Jr., Winona Perry, Donna Dunlap and Pamela Walker with two grandchildren and a host of relatives and friends. Services will be Wednesday, February 2, 2011 at Hooper Memorial Home Inc., 11AM, viewing at 10AM and Paxtang Cemetery will be his final resting place.

To order [memorial trees](https://manage2.tukioswebsites.com/o/v2/trees/78de5dbd-bcef-4636-a255-548f640155a4) or send flowers to the family in memory of James Drayton, please visit our [flower store](https://manage2.tukioswebsites.com/orders/v2/flowers/78de5dbd-bcef-4636-a255-548f640155a4).
